title: Taidumcraft Server
description: Official server version for the TaidumCraft official server. Taidumcraft Modpack found here: https://modrinth.com/modpack/taidumcraft
body:
TaidumCraft Server Pack

This is our Server Side only pack for the Official TaidumCraft server

Not for Client Use - Client modpack here!

A furry themed modpack that focuses on vanilly style gameplay, immersion and adventure. made by taidums, for taidums, of taidums.
Our Goal with this pack is to create a lighthearted and fun minecraft experience in line with the furry experience. If that sounds like fun, then this pack is for you.

Disclaimer: this modpack is still a work in progress. More Content will be added as we go, so be sure to keep the pack updated.


Features

Taidumcraft has a variety of mods that try and stay true to the vanilla spirit.


The lists below only go into the general features of the pack. For a detailed list of mods, check the dependencies of the latest release

Main Content
  • Beautiful worldgen powered by Terralith
  • more lively structure generation through an assortment of mods
  • experience the changing of the seasons with Fabric Seasons
  • experience the mystery of From The Fog
  • Plant crops and make delicious meals with farmers delight
  • The Gravestone mod You're in Grave Danger
  • decorate your base with detailed blocks offered by the Chisel Refabricated mod
  • make parties and claims with Open Parties and Claims
  • with more to come soon!
Visuals
  • includes the Complimentary Reimagined shaderpack
  • Out of the Box support for most Optifine Resource packs
  • Eating animations for food items
  • Better and Mor particle effects (water splashes, falling leaves, mob particles)
  • Better looking grass
  • Dynamic lights sources
Sound
  • Use ingame voicechat on servers that support it
  • Lush ambient sounds
  • More rich and detailed sound effects
  • Dynamic sound reverb (including voicechat)
  • Tactile UI sounds
QOL
  • More informative Hunger Bar
  • Better Mount HUD
  • See players heads in chat
  • Better language loading and support for multilingual players
  • A ton of optimization mods to keep your game running smoothly
Furry Fun!
  • Recreate your own fursona in minecraft with the Ears mod
    Using this skin preset we made and this hand online tool you can get easily started
  • More Furry content to be added soon!
Credits And Sources
  • illumnations made by doctor4t
  • structory made by botanydev
  • The Taidum is a creation of Irix and we have full permission to use it in this pack (see image below)
